Comment: Professor Carrasco is very nice, but his lectures are not the most engaging. I had him for a 3-hour night lecture, which probably didn't help. Overall, he knows the material well and is very willing to help students. He responds quickly to emails. There is a group project that is a lot of work and makes up a lot of your grade, so pick a good team!!
he's super sweet and the tests are open note

Professor Carrasco is a really kind professor, but his class is extremely lecture heavy. The group project is the most challenging part of the course. Besides that, you are graded on attendance and exams (which are open note). I would take him again.

Professor Carrasco is a nice guy. The class is very long and lecture-heavy, so it is pretty tiring, but the tests are open note, which will definitely work in your favor. He also takes attendance with signatures.

Comment: Every test is open book. hes a savior. lectures are boring tho. for the tests i just use my ipad and open the powerpoint he reads off of and i get a high score.

Prof. Carrasco isn't terrible. It is very lecture heavy (and boring). Most people in class are playing papa's pizzeria or doing other homework.
